recommended_commands: python bridge.py panda3d-smoke . --runtime portable --runtime-path runtimes/panda3d_py313 --entry main.py --require-screenshot
python bridge.py full-pass . --profile panda3d --runtime auto --smoke --entry main.py --require-screenshot

required_controls: Esc opens settings or exits as designed
H toggles HUD when HUD exists
common_failures: portable runtime path exists but does not contain Panda3D
mock display accidentally treated as screenshot proof
smoke process timed out because no bridge hook or project smoke mode exited the app
required_runtime_checks: dependency probe when using system/portable Python
entry point discovery when using source runtime
packaged executable discovery when using packaged_exe runtime
explicit skipped-reporting for untested interaction checks
shipping_rules: do not ship if latest required smoke produced a crash log
do not treat mock display mode as visual proof
keep screenshot proof for tested visual builds
prefer packaged_exe mode for final/Steam player-route proof
document unsupported or unverified paths honestly
do not treat generic proof routes as the real player route unless the screenshot/marker proves it
required_static_checks: ui bounds heuristic when UI code changed
text fit heuristic when UI code changed
